summary: Excellent audience recording that many say sounds better than the board, though it’s cut short
review: The sole review praises this audience tape as sounding superior to a typical soundboard capture, highlighting the taper's skill despite the era’s limited equipment. The only drawback noted is that the recording was edited down and ends prematurely.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review focusing on the audio quality; no musical performance details are provided, so rating leans on recording praise while accounting for the cut‑short issue.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the audience tape beats a board recording; praised despite poor equipment of the time, but noted it is cut too short.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information on set or song flow provided in reviews.
